AFFECT [[6554413872610298131]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[15225781669996973588]]
REBUILD [[17335937499636240983]]
LOCATE BEFORE STREAM \ ~&214621519406&~ \
INSERT {
~&214622607920&~ ~&180979&~ = ~&180978&~ + 10 < ~&214634455770&~.~&7082886407723&~ ? ~&180978&~ + 10 : ~&214634455770&~.~&7082886407723&~ - 1;
~&6504391364&~.~&7360629027320823814&~(~&180979&~, ~&7711904883727328&~.~&233707001683223&~);
}
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
